# Y.L Business Booster — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Y.L Business Booster is a web design and landing page creation business focused on helping other businesses grow their online presence. The brand name suggests a mission-driven identity centered around boosting and accelerating business success. The company positions itself as a professional digital partner that builds high-converting websites and landing pages for clients.

---

## Pages

### בית
https://y-l-business-booster-297a479d.zappy5.app
Y.L Business Booster מתמחה בעיצוב ופיתוח אתרים ודפי נחיתה שמביאים תוצאות אמיתיות. הפוך את הרעיון שלך לעסק משגשג עם פתרונות Web Design &amp; Development מותאמים אישית. דברו איתנו עוד היום!

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://y-l-business-booster-297a479d.zappy5.app
- Endpoint: https://y-l-business-booster-297a479d.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text)
  - `email` (email)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox)

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Y.L Business Booster
Y.L Business Booster is a web design and landing page creation business focused on helping other businesses grow their online presence. The brand name suggests a mission-driven identity centered around boosting and accelerating business success. The company positions itself as a professional digital partner that builds high-converting websites and landing pages for clients.

## Target Audience
- בעלי עסקים קטנים
- יזמי סטארטאפ
- משווקים דיגיטליים

## Industry
Web Design & Development
